label: 第271話
source_locator: 単行本30巻 目次 p.148
summary_short: 虎杖・伏黒・釘崎は、相手の容姿を変えて嫌がらせをする呪詛師を捕らえる。虎杖は五条から、自分とは異なる強さを持つ者たちが後を継ぐことへの期待を託された会話を思い出し、三人は次の任務へ進む。
summary_full: 虎杖・伏黒・釘崎は、相手の容姿を変えて嫌がらせをする呪詛師を捕らえる。虎杖は五条から、自分とは異なる強さを持つ者たちが後を継ぐことへの期待を託された会話を思い出し、三人は次の任務へ進む。三人は相手の顔を変える術式を持つ呪詛師を分析し、連携して捕縛する。宿儺は死後の魂の通路で真人へ敗北を認め、別の生き方を選ぶ可能性を語る。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: 悠仁 , 恵 , and 野薔薇 go on a mission to stop a 呪詛師 who's harassing civilians. Upon completing their mission 悠仁 recalls one of his final conversations with his sensei. 五条悟's dream has been achieved. His strong, intelligent allies will protect the jujutsu world from now on.
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: After examining Fukuzawa's fiancée, 野薔薇 finds no cursed seals or 術式 markings on the woman, suspecting that the perpetrator, if they are not a 呪霊 or using their 術式 remotely, is nearby. 悠仁 speculates that they are within the range of the culprit's 術式 , which 恵 agrees with while finding the matter troublesome, since that means the technique is covert or the 呪詛師 has skilled control over their 呪力 . 野薔薇 then asks Fukuzawa's fiancée if her boyfriend's face ever returned to normal, to which she answers that it hasn't, or it may have when she was asleep. With that assumption, 恵 hypothesizes that the technique's range is 50 meters, 100 to be safe. 悠仁 wonders how they could find the perpetrator since they are in the middle of town. 恵 agrees that there are too many people, buildings and blindspots around them, but believes they can notice when the technique is reactivated if they find a good vantage point. 悠仁 proposes that they lure the perpetrator to an open area, which 恵 soundly rejects since only an idiot would just follow them wherever. 野薔薇 then suggests that they have 悠仁 take Fukuzawa's girlfriend out of the technique's range, which 恵 also rejects since the perp would not immediately come out of hiding and follow them, and could easily wait until the sorcerers leave to resume activity. 悠仁 then comes up with the idea of sending the couple away on a car, which is once again dismissed by 恵 since the perpetrator could be tracking the woman with their 術式 while the three of them can only rely on their eyes. 悠仁 argues that they could locate the 呪詛師 when they reactivate their technique once the couple returns, but 恵 notes that that would give the culprit the initiative instead since they could choose when to use their technique. Angry at 恵 for dismissing all of their ideas, 悠仁 and 野薔薇 ask him for a plan. 恵 echoes the plan to get the girlfriend outside the 術式's range and take down the culprit once the technique reactivates, with his idea involving a 40-floor condominium that is over 150 meters aboveground. His plan is to have the couple escape the technique's area by pretending to go visit their friend and reaching the top floor through the elevator. While 伊地知 and a window watch the entrance and buzzer, the first-years will each find a good lookout point and watch for the perp to restart their technique, effectively luring them out into the open. The plan is put into action, and as the couple reach the 40th floor, the girlfriend tells the students over her phone that her boyfriend's face returned to normal. Immediately, the first-years sense the activation of a 術式, with 野薔薇 noticing a masked man standing on a building nearby. Realizing that he is the 呪詛師, 野薔薇 informs the others and jumps down towards the man. At the same time, 悠仁 arrives and the two prepare to apprehend the 呪詛師. Suddenly, 悠仁 and 野薔薇 both notice each other's eyes being comically enlarged, shocking and distracting them. As the 呪詛師 flees, he is suddenly intercepted by 恵 and 玉犬: 渾 , who successfully capture him. Some time after reprimanding his classmates, 恵 brings the 呪詛師 to the girlfriend and asks if she recognizes him. When she says she doesn't, the man angrily reveals that he bought the woman's bag, causing her to remember. It is later revealed that the man was her customer at a cabaret club, and held a grudge against her when she forgot about him after he bought her the expensive bag. Seeing the dejected man about to be sent away, 悠仁 approaches him and assures him that he won't be executed for his crime. The man is remorseful, feeling guilty for not properly conveying his affection to the woman and instead blaming her. When they were preparing for the showdown against 宿儺 , 悠仁 approached 五条 after undergoing replacement training with 日下部 , wanting to do it with him next. 五条 is reluctant, admitting that he wants his students to carry on his wish and dream if he dies, and grow and surpass him in their own way instead of trying to mimic him. 五条's seemingly unconfident behavior confuses 悠仁, but 五条 assures him that he has never been more sure of himself before stating that he trusts 悠仁 to carry out his will. Remembering this interaction, 悠仁 assures the former 呪詛師 that he will be fine since he acknowledged his own shortcomings, and says that he looks forward to working with him once he atones. Afterwards, 野薔薇 inquires about the whereabouts of 宿儺's last finger , to which 悠仁 answers that he got rid of it. In response to her surprise, 悠仁 assures 野薔薇 that the 呪物 is not dangerous anymore and is the perfect talisman against curses. Staring at his left hand that is missing fingers, 悠仁 is certain that it will be alright. 宿儺's last finger is left unsealed. At the passageway for the circulation of souls, 真人 greets 宿儺, surprised that he died. After explaining how his 術式 allowed him to linger there, 真人 asks 宿儺 if he was lying when he said he was living only as befits his nature. 真人 speculates that 宿儺 lived for the sake of revenge against those who scorned him for his abnormality. 宿儺 believes that is exactly what befit his nature as a cursed and unwanted wretch, before realizing that he did have a choice for how to live. To be precise, he had two choices, represented by a young 裏梅 and another unknown person. The reason he chose a life of revenge and vomiting out the curse within himself was because he feared his own curse would immolate himself, but now that he has a second chance, he wants to choose a different path. As 宿儺 walks down the path with a crying 裏梅, 真人 criticizes him for wanting to settle down, finding it boring. However, 宿儺 is content with his choice, admitting that he has lost. A furious and sulking 真人 is then left fuming by himself. As the students of 東京 呪術高専 happily head out for their missions, in a thermometer shed somewhere, the last finger of 両面宿儺 lies in its opened box, its curse no longer sealed away.
candidate_evidence.characters_raw_text: 釘崎野薔薇 虎杖悠仁 伏黒恵 伊地知潔高 (言及のみ) 日下部篤也 (言及のみ) 五条悟 (回想) 真人 (想像) 宿儺 (想像) 裏梅 (想像) 禪院真希 乙骨憂太 パンダ 狗巻棘 星綺羅羅 秤金次
candidate_evidence.techniques_raw_text: 呪物 両面宿儺's 宿儺の指 (x1) 伏黒恵の術式 十種影法術 術式 玉犬: 渾 玉犬: 渾

key_events_verified_phase11: 虎杖・伏黒・釘崎は、相手の容姿を変えて嫌がらせをする呪詛師を捕らえる。
虎杖は五条から、自分とは異なる強さを持つ者たちが後を継ぐことへの期待を託された会話を思い出し、三人は次の任務へ進む。
三人は相手の顔を変える術式を持つ呪詛師を分析し、連携して捕縛する。
宿儺は死後の魂の通路で真人へ敗北を認め、別の生き方を選ぶ可能性を語る。
verification_notes_phase11: 集英社公式24～30巻目次・巻概要、日本語の原作漫画巻別資料、旧候補資料を話単位で突合した最終区間。単行本各ページの直接最終照合前。
